name: Trocco
description: Japanese SaaS ETL/ELT data pipeline with 100+ connectors (Salesforce, LINE Ads, KARTE, Kintone); built by primeNumber.

seo.title: Trocco — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Trocco: Japanese SaaS ETL/ELT data pipeline with 100+ connectors (Salesforce, LINE Ads, KARTE, Kintone); built by primeNumber.

when_to_use: Japanese SaaS ETL with connectors for LINE Ads, KARTE, Kintone
ELT pipeline from Salesforce to BigQuery for Japanese teams
Data integration platform built for Japanese SaaS ecosystems
Managed data pipeline with observability for Japanese analytics
Replacing custom ETL scripts for Japanese marketing data stacks

pros: Deep Japanese SaaS connectors (KARTE, Kintone, LINE)
Good dbt integration for ELT workflows
Competitive pricing vs Fivetran in APAC
cons: English docs and support lag Japanese version
Limited awareness outside Japan and APAC
Connector catalog thinner for Western SaaS
review.verdict: The obvious ELT choice for Japanese stacks; outside APAC, Fivetran or Airbyte still win on ecosystem.
review.best_for: Japanese data teams integrating local SaaS and ad platforms into warehouses
review.not_for: Western companies with no Japanese data sources or stakeholders
